objective: Build the Sandbox/non-Sandbox prototypes, execute the host and clean-VM trust matrix, and freeze the exact read-only hardware-lab handoff plan.
deliverables: Sandboxed and non-Sandbox signed prototypes with actual entitlement dumps.
Clean-VM Gatekeeper/quarantine matrix for DevEco, downloaded and no-quarantine HDC controls.
Canonical, hashable read-only USB/UART/TCP lab plan and target prerequisites for TASK-M0A-007; this Task does not claim real-hardware evidence.

verification.expectedEvidence: The chosen absolute path/hash/version/endpoint remains fixed for the Job.
The server remains external and automatic stop/restart calls are zero.
Managed ownership is assigned only with PID/path/endpoint evidence.
A diagnostic error is shown; no key deletion, home reset or server restart occurs.
Every matrix cell records pass, fail or blocked with the exact tool hash and diagnostic classification.

verification.method: Clean-VM execution of quarantined downloaded HDC.
verification.expectedEvidence: Blocked and user-allowed outcomes are distinguished, with exact non-bypass guidance and system evidence.
The result distinguishes Gatekeeper/quarantine from Sandbox/file-access failures.

verification.method: Safari download and Archive Utility extraction on restored VM.
verification.expectedEvidence: Quarantine propagation and resulting assessment are captured without changing xattrs.

stopConditions: A scenario requires ArkDeck to remove quarantine, re-sign a tool, copy/delete a private key or disable system security.
The clean VM snapshot or exact HDC fixture is unavailable.
A new entitlement or distribution exception is required but not approved in the platform change.
